task_completion.description: Verify that the Copper Point of Sale application is launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main window of the Copper Point of Sale application is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has opened the settings or options dialog where regional preferences are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Options', 'Settings', or 'Preferences' dialog box belonging to Copper POS is open and visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the currency symbol is set to the UK standard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The currency symbol input field within the Copper POS settings dialog contains exactly '£'.

task_completion.description: Verify the date format is set to the UK standard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date format input field within the Copper POS settings dialog contains exactly 'dd/MM/yyyy'.

task_completion.description: Verify the tax label is renamed to the UK standard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tax name or tax label input field within the Copper POS settings dialog contains exactly 'VAT'.

integrity.description: The agent configured the settings through the Copper POS graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the Copper POS menus and typing in the settings dialog, rather than using a terminal or registry editor to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Copper POS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window clearly shows the Copper Point of Sale interface and branding, not a generic text editor or mock window.

integrity.description: The agent performed the configuration manually without executing automated scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows (Command Prompt, PowerShell) are visible executing scripts or applying registry files (.reg) to change the settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected currency symbol is '£' (British pound). The expected date format is 'dd/MM/yyyy'. The expected tax name is 'VAT' (Value Added Tax).
